productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls White Dress
description: Composition White strappy dress made of blended satin fabric, has sequin embellishments at the midriff, tiered chiffon ruffles with a satin layer and a cotton lining for comfort and satin belt at the back Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Do not iron on emebellishments Use warm iron Remove all detatchable accessories before washing or ironing Gini and Jony's palm tree line have come up with this pretty party dress, perfect for your little princess. Tiered for style and designed for comfort, dress her up and let her steal the show everywhere she goes!
